column1: # LineaMini_S3 OTA partition table -- 16MB flash (DFR0975 / ESP32-S3-WROOM-1-N16R8).
# Same OTA scheme as partitions_lm_ota.csv (the 4MB C6 table)
# S3's 16MB flash: two large OTA app slots (ota_0/ota_1) so ArduinoOTA's
# Update.begin() has a valid inactive slot to write into -- a single-slot layout
# (e.g. huge_app.csv) makes espota accept the invitation then fail silently.

column3: 600 B = 6.25MB) each -- far larger than the current

column2: leaving generous OTA headroom. LittleFS gets 0x370000 (~3.4MB) for

column1: # the shot log. Label stays "spiffs" (Arduino LittleFS mounts by that label).
# Offsets sum to exactly 0x1000000 (16MB); both app slots are 0x10000-aligned.
